name: Brooks Morris
awards: Financial Excellence Award, Transparency Leadership Recognition
bio: Brooks leads finance and operations with data-backed discipline, translating complex numbers into clear decisions that improve performance and control risk. His systems mindset strengthens forecasting, accountability, and cross-functional execution so teams can deliver with confidence.
careerHighlights: Leads finance and operations with measurable, data-backed discipline.
Improves forecasting and controls to support confident leadership decisions.
Builds cross-functional accountability through process clarity and reporting.
Connects financial insight to operational execution in real time.
funFact: Brooks enjoys turning complex financial data into decisions teams can act on immediately.
certifications: Six Sigma Master Black Belt, Six Sigma Black Belt, Procore Certified Admin
